title: Patth
subTitle: Avi, a young man, murders Bhullar, a local gangster, along with his friends after his sister, Nandini, is killed. Later, they surrender themselves to Bhullar's boss and eventually join his gang.

title: Buddha Mar Gaya
subTitle: A self-made industrialist dies as his company is on the brink of success. With the launch of the IPO, the deceased's family agrees to conceal his death until all shares are sold.

title: Golmaal Kids
subTitle: A rich businessman fatefully bumps into his former girlfriend while on the search for someone to take care of his three mischievous children.

title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
subTitle: Bharat, a common man, decides to fight corruption and secure the rights of common people when some government officials take advantage of him.

title: Patth
subTitle: Avi, a young man, murders Bhullar, a local gangster, along with his friends after his sister, Nandini, is killed. Later, they surrender themselves to Bhullar's boss and eventually join his gang.

title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
subTitle: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
subTitle: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Parwana
subTitle: Parwana, a thief, steals a bag containing explosives, which belongs to a terrorist. The police then set out to hunt him as he is now labelled a terrorist.

title: Joshila Janbaz
subTitle: Bhagvathi, a tea vendor, has big dreams for his younger brother, Guna. However, Guna gets killed by his girlfriend's father, who is unaware that his daughter is pregnant.

title: Kyaa Kool Hai Hum
subTitle: Living in Mumbai, Rahul and Karan dream of living luxurious lives despite their meagre salaries. When they get evicted from their apartment for not paying the rent, they hunt for rich girlfriends.

title: Madhoshi
subTitle: Despite being engaged to Arpit, Anupama falls in love with Aman, a stranger. However, when her family members decide to meet him, they are shocked to discover that a person named Aman does not exist.

title: Madhoshi
subTitle: Despite being engaged to Arpit, Anupama falls in love with Aman, a stranger. However, when her family members decide to meet him, they are shocked to discover that a person named Aman does not exist.

title: Hostel
subTitle: Karan, a freshman, goes to live in a hostel and becomes a victim of ragging. After facing severe humiliation, he musters the courage to fight his perpetrators and also sets out to punish them.

title: The Murderer
subTitle: Rocky, a well-known singer and performer at an elite hotel, becomes the prime suspect when Maheema, a news reporter, who was deeply in love with him, is found dead.

title: Jai Balaji Mehndipur Wale
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

subTitle: Living in Mumbai, Rahul and Karan dream of living luxurious lives despite their meagre salaries. When they get evicted from their apartment for not paying the rent, they hunt for rich girlfriends.

title: Lajja
subTitle: Trapped within the confines of a male-dominated society, four courageous women fight their battles, each unrelated yet resonant with the others.

title: Unnaruge Naan Irundhal
subTitle: A taxi driver's life changes after he meets Mahalakshmi, a girl who is financially indebted to many. While they grow closer to each other, his encounter with his favourite actor threatens their love.

title: Omkara
subTitle: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

title: Diary of a Butterfly
subTitle: Gul, an aspiring model, wants to be successful in the fashion industry and decides to achieve her dream by any means necessary. However, she soon realises that it comes at a price.

title: EMI: Liya Hai to Chukana Padega
subTitle: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

title: Unakkaga Ellam Unakkaga
subTitle: Sakthivel, an irresponsible man, disapproves of the marriage arranged for him by his father and tries to ruin it. However, he is surprised to learn that the prospective bride is the woman he loves.
